title: Registry Audit Ack Cursor v1
description: Local state file written by whatever ships audit events off-host, and read by services to check shipping freshness. Records the observed off-host delivery watermark; local hash chains prove only retained-set consistency, so this cursor is the completeness evidence for shipped events.

acked_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp of when the writer last confirmed delivery of audit events to the off-host destination.

last_acked_hash.description: Chain hash of the last audit entry confirmed delivered. Binds the ack to the actual chain and enables future backlog-depth checks without a schema break.

writer.description: Identity of the shipping component that wrote this cursor.
